title: EconomicOperator

companyName.description: The company name of the registered Economic Operator.

addressLine1.description: The first line of the registered Economic Operator's street address.

addressLine2.description: The second line, if any, of the registered Economic Operator's street address. This field is not always used, but can be used for 'Suite Number' or 'Apt Number'.

city.description: The city of the registered Economic Operator's street address.

stateOrProvince.description: The state or province of the registered Economic Operator's street address.

postalCode.description: The postal code of the registered Economic Operator's street address.

country.description: The two-letter ISO 3166 standard abbreviation of the country of the registered Economic Operator's address.

phone.description: The registered Economic Operator's business phone number.

email.description: The registered Economic Operator's business email address.

description: The type that provides required Economic Operator information about the manufacturer and/or supplier of the item.
